query:
UPDATE users
        SET display_name = COALESCE(display_name, NULLIF($2, ''), $3),
            pronouns = COALESCE(NULLIF(pronouns, ''), $4, pronouns),
            country = COALESCE(NULLIF(country, ''), $5, country),
            backstory = COALESCE(NULLIF(backstory, ''), $6, backstory)
        WHERE user_id = $1
